---
title: "Key Info and Announcements"
date-modified: "today"
format: 
  html:
    link-external-newwindow: true
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

## Announcements

- Waiting on a few people to take Quiz 1
- Lab 2 discussion this Wednesday! 
  - In-person, required
- If you are a BSTA student, we have group advising this Thursday at 5:30 in VPT 515

## Key Dates

- HW 2 due 5/2
- Lab 3 due 5/10

## Last class

- Tests for GLMs when we use maximum likelihood estimation
  - When model fit is based in likelihood function
- Wald test is good for a single coefficient
  - Often what we use to report confidence intervals for coefficient estimates
- LRT is good for comparing models 
  - Can compare model with to model without a specific variable 
  - Can compare model with to model without a specific variablessss
  
|   | Wald test | Score test | LRT |
|-----------------------|-----------------|-----------------|-----------------|
| Used to test significance of single coefficient | [{{< iconify ic round-check-box size=40px >}}]{style="color:#70AD47;"} | [{{< iconify ic round-check-box size=40px >}}]{style="color:#70AD47;"} | [{{< iconify ic round-check-box size=40px >}}]{style="color:#70AD47;"} |
| *Can be* used to report confidence interval for a single coefficient | [{{< iconify ic round-check-box size=40px >}}]{style="color:#70AD47;"} | [{{< iconify ic round-check-box size=40px >}}]{style="color:#70AD47;"} | [{{< iconify ic round-check-box size=40px >}}]{style="color:#70AD47;"} |
| Confidence interval reported by R for a single coefficient (and most commonly used) | [{{< iconify ic round-check-box size=40px >}}]{style="color:#70AD47;"} | [{{< iconify f7 xmark-square-fill size=40px >}}]{style="color:#C2352F;"} | [{{< iconify f7 xmark-square-fill size=40px >}}]{style="color:#C2352F;"} |
| Use to test significance/contribution to outcome prediction of multi-level categorical covariate | [{{< iconify f7 xmark-square-fill size=40px >}}]{style="color:#C2352F;"} | [{{< iconify f7 xmark-square-fill size=40px >}}]{style="color:#C2352F;"} | [{{< iconify ic round-check-box size=40px >}}]{style="color:#70AD47;"} |
| Used for comparing two models with different (but nested) covariates | [{{< iconify f7 xmark-square-fill size=40px >}}]{style="color:#C2352F;"} | [{{< iconify f7 xmark-square-fill size=40px >}}]{style="color:#C2352F;"} | [{{< iconify ic round-check-box size=40px >}}]{style="color:#70AD47;"} |
